en: Then Zophar the Naamathite answered and said:
zh: 拿瑪人瑣法回答說：

en: "Therefore my thoughts answer me, because of my haste within me.
zh: “我的心思煩擾叫我回話， 因為我內心急躁。

en: I hear censure that insults me, and out of my understanding a spirit answers me.
zh: 我聽見了那羞辱我的責備， 心靈因著我的悟性回答我。

en: Do you not know this from of old, since man was placed on earth,
zh: 你不知亙古以來， 自從地上有人以來，

en: that the exulting of the wicked is short, and the joy of the godless but for a moment?
zh: 惡人的歡呼並不長久， 不敬虔者的快樂，不過是暫時的嗎？

en: Though his height mount up to the heavens, and his head reach to the clouds,
zh: 雖然他的高貴上達於天， 他的頭直插雲霄，

en: he will perish forever like his own dung; those who have seen him will say, 'Where is he?'
zh: 他必永遠滅亡像自己的糞一般， 素來看見他的，都要說：‘他在哪裡呢？’

en: He will fly away like a dream and not be found; he will be chased away like a vision of the night.
zh: 他必如夢一般飛逝，人再也找不著他， 他必被趕去如夜間的異象，

en: The eye that saw him will see him no more, nor will his place any more behold him.
zh: 親眼見過他的，必不再見他， 他的本處也必看不見他。

en: His children will seek the favor of the poor, and his hands will give back his wealth.
zh: 他的兒女必向窮人求恩， 他們的手要退還他不義之財，

en: His bones are full of his youthful vigor, but it will lie down with him in the dust.
zh: 他的骨頭雖然充滿青春活力， 卻必與他一同躺臥在塵土中。

en: "Though evil is sweet in his mouth, though he hides it under his tongue,
zh: 邪惡在他的口中雖然甘甜， 他把邪惡藏在自己的舌下。

en: though he is loath to let it go and holds it in his mouth,
zh: 他雖然愛惜不捨， 含在口中，

en: yet his food is turned in his stomach; it is the venom of cobras within him.
zh: 然而他的食物在他腹中卻要變壞， 在他裡面成為眼鏡蛇的毒汁。

en: He swallows down riches and vomits them up again; God casts them out of his belly.
zh: 他吞下了財寶，還要把它吐出來， 神要從他的腹中把它掏出來，

en: He will suck the poison of cobras; the tongue of a viper will kill him.
zh: 他必吸吮眼鏡蛇的毒液， 腹蛇的舌頭必把他殺死。

en: He will not look upon the rivers, the streams flowing with honey and curds.
zh: 他必不得看見江河， 就是流蜜與奶的江河。

en: He will give back the fruit of his toil and will not swallow it down; from the profit of his trading he will get no enjoyment.
zh: 他勞苦所得的必歸別人，自己卻不得吃用； 他交易得來的財利，自己卻不得享用。

en: For he has crushed and abandoned the poor; he has seized a house that he did not build.
zh: 因為他欺壓窮人，不顧他們， 強搶不是自己建造的房屋。

en: "Because he knew no contentment in his belly, he will not let anything in which he delights escape him.
zh: 因為他內心沒有安寧， 他不能保存他喜愛的東西。

en: There was nothing left after he had eaten; therefore his prosperity will not endure.
zh: 他吃得一無所剩， 所以他的福樂不能持久；

en: In the fullness of his sufficiency he will be in distress; the hand of everyone in misery will come against him.
zh: 他在滿足有餘的時候，陷入困境， 受過苦的人的手都臨到他身上。

en: To fill his belly to the full God will send his burning anger against him and rain it upon him into his body.
zh: 他正在填飽肚腹的時候， 神就把猛烈的怒氣降在他身上， 他正在吃飯的時候， 神要把這怒氣如雨降在他身上。

en: He will flee from an iron weapon; a bronze arrow will strike him through.
zh: 他要逃避鐵製的兵器， 但銅弓的箭必把他射穿；

en: It is drawn forth and comes out of his body; the glittering point comes out of his gallbladder; terrors come upon him.
zh: 他把箭一抽，箭就從背後出來， 發亮的箭頭從他的膽中出來， 死亡的驚恐臨到他身上。

en: Utter darkness is laid up for his treasures; a fire not fanned will devour him; what is left in his tent will be consumed.
zh: 萬般黑暗為他的財寶留存， 不是由人吹著的火要吞滅他， 要毀掉他帳棚中所剩下的。

en: The heavens will reveal his iniquity, and the earth will rise up against him.
zh: 天必顯露他的罪孽， 地要興起來攻擊他，

en: The possessions of his house will be carried away, dragged off in the day of God's wrath.
zh: 他的家產必被掠去， 在 神忿怒的日子被沖走。

en: This is the wicked man's portion from God, the heritage decreed for him by God."
zh: 這是惡人從 神所得的分， 是 神給他指定的產業。”
